message:
🐛 fix goroutine leak on client disconnect (#9517, #9527) (#9549)

- Add context.Context propagation through all Drive API functions
- Detect client disconnect via w.Flush() errors and cancel context
- Use select with ctx.Done() for semaphore acquisition in goroutines
- Decouple ACMM scan context from primary request lifecycle
- Skip noisy error logs when cancellation is the root cause

Closes #9517, #9527

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
